title: Book a table
largerGroupRedirect: For {{n}} guests and up we'll take you to a short group request — {{restaurant}} will plan you in personally.
manualApprovalDefault: Reservations from {{n}} guests are confirmed personally by {{restaurant}}.
noSlots: Unfortunately there are no times available on this day.
fullBody: Want to join the waitlist? We'll be in touch as soon as something opens up.
yourDetailsSub: So we can reach you about your reservation.
zoneQ: Where do you prefer to sit?
requestsRequiredPlaceholder: E.g. occasion, preferred menu, drink package…
requestsHint: For groups of {{n}} and up, a short note helps us prepare properly.
marketing: I'd like to receive news and offers from {{restaurant}}.
termsLine: By confirming you agree with the restaurant's cancellation terms.
confirmedActiveSub: Your reservation at {{restaurant}} is in the schedule.
confirmedPendingSub: {{restaurant}} will check your reservation and confirm personally.
channelHint: You'll receive a confirmation through your preferred channel as soon as the restaurant has set up its communication.
approvalBanner: We'll confirm your reservation within 24 hours. You'll receive a message as soon as the table is definitively reserved.

errors.messageRequired: Please add a short note for the restaurant
errors.availabilityFailed: Something went wrong while checking availability.
errors.rateLimitBody: You've reached the maximum number of attempts. Please try again in {{minutes}} minute{{plural}}.
errors.unavailable: Booking isn't possible at the moment. Please try again later or call the restaurant.
errors.fillRequired: Please fill in the required fields

group.heading: Group request
group.intro: Lovely that you're coming with a larger group. For groups of {{n}} and up we plan in personally.
group.notice: For larger groups the restaurant may later ask for a reservation guarantee.
group.receivedHeading: Your group request has been received
group.receivedBody: For a group of this size, {{restaurant}} checks availability personally.
